wins: Increased dividend from $0.53 to $0.56 per share
Strong performance in markets with 38% growth in banking
Improved operating leverage across multiple businesses
Tangible progress in transformation and simplification efforts
risks: Regulatory actions and data quality management issues
Credit seasonality and normalization of certain vintages
Uncertainty around Basel III endgame and potential impact on buybacks
Slower economy and potential rate cuts affecting credit costs
Ongoing challenges with regulatory reporting and compliance
